    devel/jetbrains-webstorm: Update to 2023.2.4

    ChangeLog:
    https://youtrack.jetbrains.com/articles/WEB-A-233538446/WebStorm-2023.2.4-232.10203.14-build-Release-Notes

    Fixes two bugs:

     * Can not paste the text (data) on the windows remote desktop, copied from IDEA
       editor
     * Commit window shows full path, irregularly
